  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 4): b2-b3-b4-b5 (b5 on top, b2 on table)
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (on b4 b3)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
